I found a document titled "vacation-plans.docx" that contains information about your Hawaii trip, including a basic packing list. I'll create a more comprehensive packing list based on your planned activities and save it as "hawaii-packing-list.docx" before sharing it with john.doe@gmail.com.

args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimwear (2-3 sets)
- Beach cover-ups
- Flip-flops/sandals
- Casual t-shirts and shorts
- Light sweater or jacket (for cooler evenings)
- Dressy outfit (for the luau)
- Underwear and socks
- Sleepwear
- Hat/cap for sun protection
- Sunglasses

## Activities & Outdoor Gear
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Water shoes
- Hiking shoes (for Diamond Head trail)
- Beach towel/quick-dry towel
- Reusable water bottle
- Day backpack
- Camera and charger
- Waterproof phone case
- Binoculars (for sightseeing)

## Toiletries & Health
- Sunscreen (reef-safe, SPF 30+)
- After-sun lotion/aloe vera
- Insect repellent
- First aid kit
- Motion sickness medication (if needed for boat trips)
- Prescription medications
- Toiletries (toothbrush, toothpaste, shampoo, etc.)
- Hair care products

## Electronics
- Phone and charger
- Portable power bank
- Camera and accessories
- Travel adapter (if needed)
- Headphones

## Documents & Money
- Passport/ID
- Flight tickets
- Hotel reservation details
- Travel insurance information
- Credit cards and cash
- Emergency contact list
- Itinerary printout

## Miscellaneous
- Reusable shopping bag
- Books or e-reader
- Journal and pen
- Snacks for travel days
- Small gifts/souvenirs to share

Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii! 🌺
